vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #622 (narrowed): communication bridge filter for deft-directive-review-cycle. Improvement 1 (clean-context reviewer) is split out to deftai/slizard#124.

plan.title: feat(skills): communication bridge filter for deft-directive-review-cycle (intent-aware finding triage)

narratives.Description: Add an intent-filter step to skills/deft-directive-review-cycle/SKILL.md Phase 2: before fixing reviewer findings, classify each as in-scope/implement, in-scope/surface-to-user, or out-of-scope/defer-to-follow-up-issue. Prevents scope creep, user-intent conflicts, and divergent loops. Source: Cognition's 'Multi-Agents: What's Actually Working'.
narratives.Origin: Ingested from https://github.com/deftai/directive/issues/622; scope narrowed to Improvement 2 only after discussion. Improvement 1 (clean-context reviewer) tracked separately at deftai/slizard#124.

x-migrator.Description: Communication bridge filter for deft-directive-review-cycle (Improvement 2 from #622).

references.title: Issue #622: feat(skills): clean-context reviewer principle and communication bridge filter for deft-review-cycle (now scoped to Improvement 2 only)
deftai/slizard#124: review: clean-context reviewer principle (Improvement 1 of #622, split out to slizard repo)
